benefits.description: Reduction in micro-addictions such as Diet Coke and morning coffee after entering ketosis/fasted state
Felt great after 5-6 weeks once body adapted

side_effects.description: Felt drained during initial detox/adaptation period
Potential anhedonia — things that used to bring joy dropped away, attributed to dopamine receptor effects

protocol_notes: Shares personal experience with Tirzepatide adaptation period (~5-6 weeks to feel good). Describes GLP-1 mechanism involving gut-brain axis, serotonin, and dopamine receptors in context of Kratom interaction. No Kratom use personally mentioned but provides mechanistic commentary.
